items.title: Chiefs Star Patrick Mahomes Signs Extension Reportedly Worth Over $500M
items.summary: The Kansas City Chiefs are taking steps to ensure franchise quarterback Patrick Mahomes spends his entire NFL career in Kansas City.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Arsenal in hunt for Williams - Thursday's gossip
items.summary: Arsenal in the hunt for Nico Williams, Juventus open talks with Aston Villa over deal for Emiliano Martinez, Paris St-Germain chase Bayern Munich's Michael Olise.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Lutkenhaus, 17, upsets Olympic champion Wanyonyi in Oslo
items.summary: American Cooper Lutkenhaus produces a stunning performance to beat Olympic champion Emmanuel Wanyonyi in the men's 800m at the Diamond League meeting in Oslo, but fellow teenage...
items.whyItMatters: Running and athletics widen the page beyond match coverage into performance and training stories.
